title: phleum tenue
intro: Phleum tenue, also known as Timothy grass, is a perennial grass species native to Europe and western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Phleum tenue include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and support respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tea or tincture, and its flowers and leaves are used in infusions to promote relaxation and alleviate symptoms of allergies.
